subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my Hope, ultimate Object of my desire and aspiration! Affliction hath touched Thy servant who boweth low before Thy glorious Majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی و غایه املی و منائی قد مس الضر عبدک الخاضع الی جبروت الجلال
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @love of God
